assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 89: '[~accountid:557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id] @psirt-analyst'. The reporter's account ID 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id is used in the mention. This Jira mention notation [~accountid:...] represents the mention in Jira's markup, corresponding to an ADF mention node when posted via the API.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 20 shows the reporter was extracted from the Jira issue: '| Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id) |'. The same account ID appears in the Step 8 summary comment (remediation.md line 89). The reporter mention is derived from the issue's reporter field, not from any ProdSec configuration. No ProdSec config reference is involved in this mention.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: affects-versions.md line 25: '[~accountid:557058:prodsec-mock-account-id] @ProdSec'. The ProdSec contact's account ID 557058:prodsec-mock-account-id is used in the mention in the Step 3 Affects Versions correction comment.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: affects-versions.md: ProdSec @mention at line 25 ('[~accountid:557058:prodsec-mock-account-id] @ProdSec'), separator at line 27 ('---'), Comment Footnote at line 28 ('This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-security]...'). The @mention precedes the footnote.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: affects-versions.md line 25 shows the ProdSec account ID in use: '[~accountid:557058:prodsec-mock-account-id] @ProdSec'. The account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' matches the expected ProdSec mock account ID, confirming successful extraction from Security Configuration and use in the Step 3 Affects Versions correction comment.
